message:
test: update mission analytics tests to match deferred completion (#5518) (#5520)

PR #5516 intentionally moved analytics completion from the stream-done
handler to the result message handler.  Update three tests:

1. "calls emitMissionCompleted" — send a result message instead of
   stream done:true so the assertion sees the call.
2. "emits completion analytics on stream done" — renamed to
   "on result message" and sends a result instead of stream done.
3. "WS close fails pending missions" — update expected disconnect
   message from "Local Agent Not Connected" to "Agent Disconnected"
   to match the markdown error content from the onclose handler
   (changed in #5511).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
